name: Asparagus and Crab Strata
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces Pkg frozen asparagus cuts, thawed and well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. Spray a 13x9x2-inch (3-quart) baking dish with a non-fat spray.
3. Place half of the bread cubes in the greased baking dish; top with cheese, asparagus, crab meat, and remaining bread cubes.
4. In a large bowl, combine milk, eggbeaters, parsley, salt, paprika, and pepper; blend well.
5. Pour the egg mixture evenly over the bread.
6. Let stand 10-15 minutes. The dish can be refrigerated covered with plastic wrap for several hours or overnight.
7. When ready to bake, uncover and bake for 55-65 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
